24.reason: [Using bitwise NOT (~) on fscanf return value is incorrect; fscanf returns EOF on failure, which is -1, and ~(-1) is 0, causing loop to terminate immediately. Should use != EOF or > 0 instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using bitwise NOT (~) on fscanf return value is incorrect; fscanf returns EOF on failure, which is -1, and ~(-1) is 0, causing loop to terminate immediately. Should use != EOF or > 0 instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using bitwise NOT (~) on fscanf return value is incorrect; fscanf returns EOF (-1) on failure, and ~(-1) is 0, causing loop to exit prematurely or behave unexpectedly. Should use != EOF or > 0 instead.]
